creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #3)
> Please update the ports tree, update perl to 5.18 or above and then build
> editors/vim (not editors/cream) again.

So this is a Perl [version] issue? If so, the version of
Perl on the box I attempted to build this port on, was
supported. Last I looked on a recent -CURRENT (11); the
Perl [EOL] is a warning, not FATAL. As such; I would
argue this is still a problem with this port (or vim),
and the port should check against the currently installed
(default_)version(s) of Perl, and issue a WARN, or FATAL,
as required. Also; wouldn't it be prudent to only provide
[port] versions that are compliant with the requirements
still in force on each RELENG_ branch?

Thank you for all your time, and consideration, Sunpoet.

--Chris
